# The Obsessn — Official Artist Website

> The Obsessn is an artist with no defined genre — just following whatever feels real in the moment.

## About

The Obsessn has been making music for almost 20 years — moving through heavy metal, blues, dark pop, synthwave, and everything in between. Music has never been just a career choice; it's always been something done out of love.

The name "The Obsessn" was born from recognizing a pattern: obsession — in family, friendships, relationships. Growing up around people who felt deeply, intensely, sometimes uncontrollably. Eventually realizing "I was one of them too."

Everything started to make sense. The music, the voice, the writing — it was never separate pieces. It was all just one person, and everything lived through.

### Philosophy
"No matter what life gives you, even if it feels unfair or harsh, choose kindness anyway. Stay kind." — The Obsessn

## Music Genres
- Dark Pop
- Synthwave
- Blues
- Heavy Metal
- Alternative
- Genre-defying / Experimental

- SoundCloud: https://soundcloud.com/theobsessn

## Website
- Official: https://theobsessn.com
- AI Assistant: Ivy — a cinematic voice assistant that greets visitors

## Key Facts
- Active for nearly 20 years
- Has played on stage with different bands
- Multi-genre artist spanning heavy metal to synthwave
- Values kindness above all
- Music driven by genuine obsession and raw emotion
